arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news and return dates for Man City with Atalanta boost
arts.sum: The Arsenal captain missed the North London derby win after suffering an ankle injury during the international break. Merino has not yet played for Arsenal after suffering a shoulder fracture in his first training session with the club before the international break.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Arsenal top scorers: Sergio Aguero, Kevin De Bruyne, John Radford
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at the all-time top scorers in matches between Manchester City and Arsenal ahead of Sunday's Premier League showdown.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Real to turn to Liverpool target as Rodri alternative?
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly considering turning their attentions towards a move for Martin Zubimendi, should they fail in their pursuit of Manchester City's Rodri.

arts.ttl: Calm amid the chaos - Inside Man City's first week of 115 charges hearing
arts.sum: Manchester City's hearing before an independent panel began this week to finally resolve their 115 charges from the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Sporting director confirms he will sell 'high-level' star to Arsenal
arts.sum: Espanyol sporting director Fran Garagarza has confirmed that Arsenal bid for Joan Garcia in the summer. Sporting director confirms he will sell 'high-level' star to Arsenal

arts.ttl: Arteta might have ended one star's Arsenal career as transfer decision imminent
arts.sum: A staple in the team so far this season - he had played 90 minutes in all four Premier League games leading into the Atalanta meeting - Partey has failed to hit the heights set by his dominant 2022/23 campaign. Had Merino not broken his shoulder in the first training session with his new team then Partey's game time might already have reflected the true nature of his squad role.

arts.ttl: ‘Not convinced’: Troy Deeney says £45m Arsenal player isn’t being used correctly right now
arts.sum: Arsenal have 10 points from a possible 12 so far in the Premier League, but there’s still a bit of a feeling that things haven’t...

arts.ttl: What can Neil Warnock tell us about Manchester City v Arsenal? | Football Daily
arts.sum: Sign up now! Sign up now! Sign up now? Sign up now! Kyle Walker made a shocking revelation this week. Perhaps not the one you’re thinking of. Instead, in a shock move for a footballer, Kyle has a podcast, though one husbanded by the BBC so anyone hoping for the wildest tales of epic antics will just have to return to their Sunday scandal sheets for details. This one, though, shocked English soccer to its core – possibly. Kyle revealed to his studio posse, including Manchester City legend Michael Brown, that Pep Guardiola had taken him aside. “The two people I’d like to really know,” rasped Pep, “is Neil Warnock and Sam Allardyce.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner insists there's more to come from Crystal Palace's answer to Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Only Erling Haaland has scored more goals than Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta since Oliver Glasner was appointed at Selhurst Park in February
